name: aipassport
description: Sovereign AI Passport — decoupled, provider-agnostic context layer with hardware-enforced zero-trust boundary

scripts.build: corepack enable pnpm && pnpm -C frontend install && pnpm -C frontend build
scripts.test: pnpm test:agent && pnpm test:gateway && pnpm test:frontend
scripts.test:gateway: pnpm -C gateway install && pnpm -C gateway test
